creator: admin@oregonfast.net

Trying to mount root from ufs:/dev/ad4s1a

The controller I'm having issues with is a LSI 300-8x doing two 1.5TB 
RAID 5 arrays that consist of 8 500GB Drives (The same model as ad4 and 6)

The card is also in a pci-x 64/100 slot.

I also haven't modified the kernel or any sysctl knobs in any way.
